pi_items.source: Schema analysis and database record counting

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly available sample database from the lerocha/chinook-database GitHub repository (v1.4.5). It contains real iTunes music data (275 artists, 347 albums, 3503 tracks) combined with fictitious customer and employee information and algorithmically generated sales data (59 existing customers, 412 invoices). The task requires adding a new customer record (ID 60) to the Customer table with specified data: Alice Johnson from Tech Solutions Inc in Portland, OR, USA (97201), phone +1 (503) 555-0100, fax +1 (503) 555-0101, email alice.johnson@techsolutions.com, assigned to support representative ID 3 (Jane Peacock). All field values fit within their database schema constraints, and all referenced entities (Employee ID 3) exist in the database. The task is to be performed using LibreOffice Base, a GUI database management tool.
